title: Pikuniku 2 is coming in 2027!
contents_preview: Hello everyone!After 7 years since the release of Pikuniku, we’re thrilled to finally reveal Pikuniku 2!We’ve been working on it since 2023. Yup, it’s been a long time.Making a 3D sequel has been both wild and delightful!In Pikuniku 2, Piku and his friends pack a picnic and set off once more to whim
